strengths: 20 years of software engineering with progressive seniority in backend systems, real-time infrastructure, and event-driven architectures
Current hands-on experience with agentic AI systems, MCP frameworks, and agent infrastructure at re:cinq
Demonstrated polyglot technical depth across TypeScript, Node.js, systems languages (D, C++), and ability to pick appropriate tools for problems
concerns: No demonstrated track record of building or scaling engineering teams; resume shows individual contributor and staff-level roles without evidence of hiring, mentorship, or organizational leadership
Missing fintech domain expertise; prior roles focus on optimization and B2B SaaS rather than financial infrastructure (credit systems, capital allocation, regulated trading)

Agentic AI experience is recent (2 months at current role) and lacks specificity around production multi-agent reasoning, feedback loops, LLM evaluation methodology, or auditable decision-making systems

key_factors.factor: Absence of engineering leadership and team scaling
No fintech infrastructure or regulated-environment experience
Agentic AI experience recent and underspecified

response.justification: Szabo brings strong foundational engineering capability spanning 20 years with recent exposure to agentic systems and deep expertise in high-performance backend infrastructure. However, this CTO role requires explicit engineering leadership (scaling teams, developing technical layers, organizational governance), fintech domain knowledge (credit systems, capital allocation, compliance), and production multi-agent AI mastery. The resume demonstrates individual contributor and staff engineer progression without evidence of team building or organizational scaling; fintech experience limited to pricing optimization rather than financial services infrastructure; and agentic AI work too recent and underspecified to establish the production maturity required.
